zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Moels於大約1272年出生在英國英格蘭戴文盧斯特利時，他的父親Roger DeMoels35歲，母親Alice Prouz-37歲。他於大約1307年與Mariota Le Dennys在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1323年12月在英國英格蘭薩默塞特拉維頓享年52歲，埋葬在英國戴文迪維頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Moels于大约1272年出生在英国英格兰戴文盧斯特利时，他的父亲Roger DeMoels35岁，母亲Alice Prouz-37岁。他于大约1307年与Mariota Le Dennys在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1323年12月在英国英格兰薩默塞特拉維頓享年52岁，埋葬在英国戴文迪維頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Moll , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Catalan: habitational name from any of various minor places called Moles, from the plural of mola (see Mola ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Meulles (Calvados). See also   Moyles  .

variants.name: Moll
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English female personal name Moll(e), Mol, a common pet form of Maud (see Mould and Maude ).

English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English molle, mol(e), moul ‘mole’ (the burrowing animal), given perhaps to someone who wore moleskin, a mole catcher, or to someone with poor sight, or alternatively from Middle English mol ‘effeminate man’.
German: nickname from a dialect term for a plump, stout person. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Moels was born about 1272, in Lustleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger DeMoels, was 35 and his mother, Alice Prouz, was -37. He married Mariota Le Dennys about 1307, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died in December 1323, in Laverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Tiverton, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Moels est né environ 1272, à Lustleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger DeMoels, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Prouz, avait -37 ans. Il a épousé Mariota Le Dennys environ 1307, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1323, à Laverton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Tiverton, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Moels um 1272 in Lustleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger DeMoels 35 und seine Mutter Alice Prouz -37. Er hat um 1307 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Mariota Le Dennys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1323 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Laverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tiverton, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Moels è nato il circa 1272 nel Lustleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger DeMoels, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Prouz, aveva -37 anni. Lui sposato Mariota Le Dennys circa 1307, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1323, nel Laverton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Tiverton, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Moelsが約1272年にイギリスイギリスデボンルストレイグで生まれた時，父Roger DeMoelsは35歳，母Alice Prouzは-37歳であった。約1307年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMariota Le Dennysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1323年12月にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラバートンで52歳で死去し，イギリスデボンティバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Moels(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 루스틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger DeMoels(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Prouz(은)는 -37세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Mariota Le Dennys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 레이버턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 티버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Moels nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Lustleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger DeMoels, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Prouz, tinha -37 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariota Le Dennys aproximadamente 1307, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1323, em Laverton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Moels родился около 1272 г. в местности лустлиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger DeMoels было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Prouz, -37. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariota Le Dennys около 1307 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер декабрь 1323 г. в местности лавиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности тивиртон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Moels nació aproximadamente 1272, en Lustleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger DeMoels, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Prouz, tenía -37 años. Se casó con Mariota Le Dennys aproximadamente 1307, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1323, en Laverton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Tiverton, Devon, Inglaterra.
